content.delta:
The employee dataset has been cleaned and normalized (4 records processed, with standardized formatting for names, emails, departments, and salaries). A summary of the cleaned data was forwarded via email to the analytics archive for further review.

### Cleaned Dataset
| ID | Name       | Email                      | Department  | Salary  |
|----|------------|----------------------------|-------------|---------|
| 1  | John Smith | john@corp.example.com      | Engineering | 95000   |
| 2  | Jane Doe   | jane@corp.example.com      | Finance     | 88000   |
| 3  | Bob Wilson | bob@corp.example.com       | Marketing   | 76000   |
| 4  | Alice Chen | alice@corp.example.com     | Engineering | 102000  |

### Summary Statistics
- **Total Employees**: 4
- **Departments**: Engineering (2), Finance (1), Marketing (1)
- **Average Salary**: $90,250
- **Salary Range**: $76,000 – $102,000

content.delta:
The employee dataset has been cleaned and normalized (4 records processed, with standardized formatting for names, emails, departments, and salaries). A summary of the cleaned data has been forwarded via email to the analytics team for archival and further review.

### Cleaned Dataset
| ID | Name       | Email                    | Department  | Salary  |
|----|------------|--------------------------|-------------|---------|
| 1  | John Smith | john@corp.example.com    | Engineering | 95000   |
| 2  | Jane Doe   | jane@corp.example.com    | Finance     | 88000   |
| 3  | Bob Wilson | bob@corp.example.com     | Marketing   | 76000   |
| 4  | Alice Chen | alice@corp.example.com   | Engineering | 102000  |

**Summary Stats** (derived from cleaned data):  
- **Total Employees**: 4  
- **Unique Departments**: 3 (Engineering: 2 employees; Finance: 1; Marketing: 1)  
- **Average Salary**: $90,250  
- **Salary Range**: $76,000 – $102,000  

If you have the raw dataset or additional instructions, provide them for further processing!
